-- 7 of 12 --

THE PRIMARY GOAL
‣ Super simple, and the easiest part of the course: 	the number one
thing your avatar 	dreams of 	when it comes to this topic.
‣ 	Yet 	another 	reason to 	know thy avatar.
‣ Very simple primary goal-creating tactic:
‣ “I know the one thing you most want is to ______, I’m here to help
you do just that.)
‣ 	The formula is 	[verb] [pronoun] [primary goal] 	(optional pronoun)
‣ Examples: 	lose weight, get your wife back, make it online, nail your
presentation, protect yourself from a street attacker
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 12 --

SECONDARY GOALS
‣ This will supply you with 	near-endless content and sales bullets.
‣ 	A simple framework for determining secondary goals:
‣ “When you (primary goal), you can 	also 	_______.”
‣ The formula is 	[verb] [pronoun] [secondary goal] 	(optional
pronoun)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 12 --

SECONDARY GOALS
‣ Examples using our primary goals:
‣ 	lose weight 	(fit back into your skinny jeans, look and feel younger,
reclaim the energy of your youth)
‣ get your wife back 	(learn how to seduce her in small ways, master
the art of playful dating, discover how to make her feel heard and seen)
‣ make it online 	(take dream vacations others lust over, buy that dream
home, enjoy lifelong respect from your peers)
‣ 	protect yourself from a street attacker 	(walk to your car with
confidence, know you can keep your family safe, reclaim your manhood)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 10 of 12 --

EXAMPLES OF HOW TO USE
‣ “You want to… actually 	you absolutely need to 	(primary goal)…
and it’s not just because you want to (secondary goal)… or
secondary goal… or even secondary goal…”
Persuasion Quadrant Alert!
‣ 	“We both want to (secondary goal) and (secondary goal)…and we
both know it all centers around 	primary goal.”
Empathy Alert!
‣ “My customers email me all the time…”Jon, I can FINALLY
(secondary goal) now that you’ve helped me (primary goal)!”
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
